message:
feat(wasm): add SequenceHandle.dotplot_self + improve WASM inlining

SequenceHandle.dotplot_self (lib.rs):
- Add `dotplot_self` method to SequenceHandle for computing self-similarity
  dot plots using pre-encoded sequence data
- This is more efficient than `dotplot_self_buffers` when running multiple
  analyses on the same sequence (e.g., progressive refinement with preview
  then full resolution)
- Matches JS `computeDotPlot` behavior: window derivation, start position
  calculation, direct/inverted similarity computation
- Add unit tests verifying basic behavior and parity with dotplot_self_buffers

WASM inlining improvements (inline-wasm-compute.ts):
- Complete rewrite of the inlining script for robustness across environments
- Generate a stable bundler-friendly wrapper instead of patching wasm-pack output
- Support both Node/Bun Buffer and browser atob for base64 decoding
- Use top-level await for clean "module is ready" semantics
- Avoid importing `.wasm` as ES module (Vite/Rollup don't support this yet)
- Critical for Bun --compile single-binary builds

Refs: phage_explorer-8qk2.6

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
